BBB Proteome Explorer

Dual-Compartment Proteomics of the Epileptic Human Brain

Paired proteomic analysis of Microvessels (BBB) and PSD Fraction (Neuronal) from 5 epilepsy patients, comparing the epileptic hippocampus against the temporal pole (within-patient control).

Proteins are shown as log2 fold-change (hippocampus vs. temporal pole) per patient. Positive values indicate higher abundance in the epileptic hippocampus.

Most upregulated and downregulated proteins in each fraction (hippocampus vs. temporal pole). Click any protein to see per-patient data.

Ligand-Receptor Interactions

Curated 53-pair cross-compartment signaling set between vessel and PSD fractions. Concordant pairs change in the same direction; discordant pairs change in opposite directions.

BBB Proteome Explorer · Rust Lab, University of Southern California · Data from paired epilepsy patient samples (n=5)
